title: corchorus capsularis
intro: Corchorus capsularis, also known as the tiliaceous or jute mallow, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Corchorus capsularis include reducing blood sugar levels, lowering cholesterol levels, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
